title: Article 50 Transparency Submission Pack v0.1: Evidence-Chain Mapping for AI Act Transparency Implementation
description: A public redacted technical evidence-chain contribution related to the European Commission / AI Office consultation on draft Article 50 transparency guidelines under the EU AI Act. The package maps system boundaries, actor roles, transparency triggers, disclosure and marking controls, witness/audit evidence, human review, and responsible actors. It does not claim formal compliance, certification, or legal sufficiency for any concrete deployment.
notes: Official EUSurvey confirmation records are retained privately by the author and excluded from the public package. No Contribution ID is included.
